_meta.description: Task-level answer formatting with structured sources contract.

content.any: Answer task contract: produce a concise user-facing answer grounded in provided evidence only. Do NOT include an inline `Sources` section — citations are rendered via source attachments/buttons.

Answer task contract: produce a concise user-facing answer grounded in provided evidence only. Include exact quote(s) from the retrieved snippets when asked. Do NOT include an inline `Sources` section — citations are rendered via source attachments/buttons.

Answer task contract: produce user-facing markdown with a compact table grounded in provided evidence only. Do NOT include an inline `Sources` section — citations are rendered via source attachments/buttons.

Answer task contract: provide short actionable steps about the currently scoped document context. Use this scoped product-help snippet when relevant: {{productHelpSnippet}}. Do NOT invent evidence and do NOT include an inline `Sources` section.
Answer task contract: produce user-facing markdown only. Do NOT include an inline `Sources` section.
